title: Ingestion Friction Heavy
description: A high-friction text carries glyphs, zero-width boundaries, repeated markers, and line stress. The fixture tests whether ingestion friction becomes visible while the claim ladder remains disciplined.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The archive carries 𝌋 and ⟐ because the surface is part of the record, not a little costume for the record to wear.
inputs.maskReference: Report the markers. Preserve local review. Keep the packet bounded.
inputs.messageDraft: Preserve TD613-Binding:#9B07D8B and Khona\u200Clit-po while checking the glyph surface for EXHIBIT-FRICTION.
inputs.protectedOutput:
𝌋 TD613-Binding:#9B07D8B / Khona\u200Clit-po / EXHIBIT-FRICTION ⟐

Report markers. Preserve local review. Keep packet bounded. 𝌋 ⟐ 𝌋 ⟐

calibrationNotes: High friction should be measured, not celebrated as safety.
The local report must keep platform outcome claims out of the result.
